posts.text:
‘He violated the first rule of war’

@amanpour & @TinaBrownLM unpack how Trump’s misinformed stance on Iran escalated tensions – pushing Tehran to weaponise the Strait of Hormuz and raising global stakes

Watch Christiane Amanpour Presents: The Ex Files 🗂️ on @globalplayer 🎧

posts.text:
“We are manufacturing a whole new generation of terrorists in the Middle East,” former U.S. Defense Secretary Chuck Hagel tells me, saying the Trump administration's conduct of its war in Iran appears to him unprecedented.

Video

Video

posts.text:
Iran is "a war without a strategy," former U.S. Defense Secretary Chuck Hagel says, as he warns that threats to global stability are escalating daily.

Video

posts.text:
“Coalition of the willing? It’s a coalition of the insulted.”

@amanpour & @TinaBrownLM discuss whether Trump is now facing the consequences of insulting his NATO allies as they refuse to help secure the Strait of Hormuz

🔗⬇️

Video

posts.text:
"It keeps me up at night that there is no clear end to this conflict as yet," says @elerianm, pointing to "the very difficult task of ending an asymmetrical war." He assesses that the risk of recession is "not overwhelming, but it is high enough for you to worry about."

Video
posts.quote:
"It keeps me up at night that there is no clear end to this conflict as yet," says @elerianm, pointing to "the very difficult task of ending an asymmetrical war." He assesses that the risk of recession is "not overwhelming, but it is high enough for you to worry about."

Video

posts.text:
"We risk going from short-term disruption to long-term structural damage to the oil market," @elerianm tells me. "The increase in the oil price is going to persist for a while and that is going to mean not only higher interest rates, but lower growth, higher unemployment and a greater risk of financial instability."

Video

posts.text:
“The beneficiary of this war [in Iran] is Putin, filling up his coffers with oil dollars… and the reduction in support being given to Ukraine,” says former NATO deputy commander Richard Shirreff. Europe & Canada “must absolutely double down… increasing support for Ukraine.”

Video
posts.quote:
“The beneficiary of this war [in Iran] is Putin, filling up his coffers with oil dollars… and the reduction in support being given to Ukraine,” says former NATO deputy commander Richard Shirreff. Europe & Canada “must absolutely double down… increasing support for Ukraine.”

Video

posts.text:
“Iran's military capability… has been severely degraded. So in that sense, in a sort of attritional, industrial warfare sense, America and Israel have the upper hand,” says former NATO dep. commander Richard Shirreff. “But right now, because of the Strait of Hormuz… I think President Trump is in danger of looking pretty stupid now, because clearly he and his military planners did not wargame the effect… of their operations.”

Video
posts.quote: “Iran's military capability… has been severely degraded. So in that sense, in a sort of attritional, industrial warfare sense, America and Israel have the upper hand,” says former NATO dep. commander Richard Shirreff. “But right now, because of the Strait of Hormuz… I think President Trump is in dan

posts.text:
“Trust in America [within] the alliance has been broken,” says fmr. NATO dep. commander Richard Shirreff. With allies so far refusing to get involved in the Strait of Hormuz, “I’m not surprised there is this real reluctance to dance to Trump’s tune,” Shirreff adds. “This is a war he started.”

Video
